The comet named Maniketu is in the form of a tiny little
star, rising in the west and visible only once for a period of only
three hours. Its crest is straight and white like a streak of milk
ejected from the breast. Even as it appears, it causes abundant
food for 4i months; but it also helps the abnormal appearance
of harmful creatures such as reptiles, venomous creatures and
the like.
[Cf. TUiJR—
cTrmiTnr- ^rfft^cnrr I H
^^frTTTT^r^?: li
According to this Sage the enormous growth of lower creatures
i.e. pests, is conditional on the comet appearing for a greater length
of time.]
hq w gfer vrHk 5TTf;?r ^
There is another comet called Jalaketu, which is spotless in
form, and is possessed of a crest raised towards the west. It rises
also in the west. It causes good crops as well as peace among
people for nine months.
[Cf. qrm—
